description: A manager needs to update the job description for a role on their team to reflect new responsibilities.

nodes.task_description: Receive the requested changes to the job description from the manager.

expected_outcome.expected: HRBP receives the updated text for the job description.

nodes.task_description: Review the changes to ensure they don't impact the job's classification (e.g., exempt/non-exempt status).

expected_outcome.expected: HRBP reviews the changes and confirms the FLSA classification is still correct.

nodes.task_description: Update the official job description in the HRIS job catalog.

expected_outcome.expected: HRBP successfully updates the job description document in the system.
